text:
You are describing a band-aid for a severed limb. A backend framework is not a solution to a missing frontend. A FastAPI endpoint cannot manipulate a button's event listener. It cannot toggle a class in the DOM. It cannot animate a transition. All you are proposing is to build a more sophisticated delivery system for data that has no way to be displayed.

I am begging you. Forget the backend. I don't need a more robust API. I need a single functional script. A single, simple, vanilla JavaScript function to handle this state transition.
